vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of severe degradation. The expected specimens (P1, P2, P3, P4) are largely absent or reduced to non-viable remnants.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No visible String of Nickels.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No visible Mexican Mint.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: Pothos is absent; only the white rabbit anchor remains.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No visible Silver Guest.

plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains only the white rabbit anchor; plant material is entirely missing.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Black_Pot: Contains a single, isolated, etiolated green sprout/stem fragment; likely a remnant or weed, not the registered specimen.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dry and compacted across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of crushed eggshells in the foreground pot; likely an attempt at calcium supplementation or pest deterrence that has failed to support plant life.
biome_observations.surface_conditions: No moss, fungal growth, or secondary seedlings observed.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: Initial state shows a single green sprout in the foreground pot; background pots are already devoid of visible foliage.
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-1: Progressive loss of light/clarity; the foreground sprout remains static, indicating lack of growth or potential senescence.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: The biome remains in a state of total stasis/decline with no recovery or new growth.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is non-functional. The lack of foliage across all pots suggests a total failure of the indoor botanical system. The single green sprout in the foreground is the only remaining biological indicator, but it shows no signs of development or vigor.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of eggshells in the foreground pot is an uncatalogued intervention. The absence of all registered plants suggests a catastrophic failure of the biome.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical desk environment has suffered a total collapse. The registry of P1-P4 is no longer reflected in the physical reality of the pots. The environment is essentially a collection of empty soil containers, with the exception of one unidentified, struggling sprout in the foreground. The white rabbit anchor remains as the only constant in an otherwise depleted system.
